---
title: "iid"
generated: true
description: "The trivial (identity) residual structure with no correlation."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.lme`](../nitrix-stats-lme.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.stats.lme._corr`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:iid -->
```python
iid() -> CorrSpec
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:iid -->
The trivial (identity) residual structure with no correlation.

The correlation matrix is $R = I$, carrying no parameters.  This is
useful as the correlation slot when only a **variance function** is wanted (a
pure heteroscedastic GLS, `nlme::gls(weights=…)` with no `correlation`).
The whitener is the identity (padded positions zeroed) and
$\log|R_i| = 0$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:iid -->
**Parameters**

*No parameters.*

**Returns** `CorrSpec`. A parameter-free correlation structure whose whitener returns the input unchanged (up to zeroing padding) with a zero log-determinant.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
